_comment: Hartmann 2005 (PRE 72 026409) 2D Yukawa OCP — kappa=2 isotherm, sweep Gamma in {80,100,120,140,160}. PLACEHOLDER UNDER OPTION (a): emitted as ERPotential with MT=0 (Yukawa-only degenerate case) to satisfy current schema (force_type enum = {hertzian_nonreciprocal, er_plasma}). Real campaign launch is BLOCKED on §10b decisions in design doc, including option (a)-vs-(b) force-class path, units-regime extension, and ndim=2 schema plumbing. lambda_mm/T0_K/dt_ms are macro-units fields the schema demands for er_plasma; here they are RE-INTERPRETED as Yukawa-OCP reduced-unit quantities mapped through a stand-in scale, NOT as physical mm/ms/K. This config will PASS strict validation but will NOT physically reproduce Hartmann 2005 until the new force class lands.
_paper_ref: Hartmann, Kalman, Donkó & Kutasi, Phys. Rev. E 72, 026409 (2005)
_force_type_doc: references/force_types.md §2 (er_plasma; reused with MT=0 as Yukawa-only — flagged §10b)
_units_doc: macro (per er_plasma registry requirement); SEMANTICALLY reduced 2D-Yukawa-OCP units. Mismatch flagged §10b/Q2.

campaign.notes: Gamma=80 (liquid). T0_K=1740 chosen so T_K/T_ref scales as 1/Gamma at fixed lambda_mm. PLACEHOLDER — see design doc §10b.
Gamma=100 (liquid, near melt). PLACEHOLDER — see design doc §10b.
Gamma=120 (transition probe). PLACEHOLDER — see design doc §10b.
Gamma=140 (transition probe). PLACEHOLDER — see design doc §10b.
